authors.author: Mike Guglielmucci
Mike Guglielmucci
Du bist hoch erhoben, Herr (Herr der ganzen Welt und aller Himmel)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Thy steadfast love oh Lord Extends unto the heavens, And Thy faithfulness unto the clouds. I feel the cold winds of judgement blowing, The Northerner is coming, The Great White Eagle must appear anytime now.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To lift me up on the seventh mountain, Bear me on Your eagle wings so strong. Lord, lift me up on the seventh mountain, I feel in my heart it's the place where I belong.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In my heart's a desperation, An anointed expectation, That a paradox must be performed; For the deep in me is calling, For that super anointing, Where divine love and power just take supreme control.

verse.name: v4
v5
verse.lines: I'm looking beyond my afflictions To a perfect restoration, A new body Thou has prepared for me; I'm tired of this dimension, Of its chaos and confusion, A new heaven and a new earth I long to see.
